examples: Benedict had been a wild boy and a quarrelsome young man.
Their self-proclaimed leaders have often proved quarrelsome and corrupt.
If Libra becomes quarrelsome, Pisces will plunge into despondency.
Quarrelsome, erratic and libidinous, Pushkin had affairs, fought duels and challenged authority wherever he went.
The king did his best to accentuate the positive in relations between Abraham's quarrelsome children.
